subcodes.title: Words to Baha'is from Seattle, Portland, and Spokane, spoken on 1912-10-17
subcodes.first_line: You are all welcome, very welcome. The friends from Seattle and Portland have labored very much to have come such a long distance
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as educator, @love and unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
